news.title: AMFI Data: Gold ETF inflows rebound to ₹3,443 crore in June after May outflows, here's what changed
news.description: Gold ETF inflows rebounded sharply to  ₹3,443 crore in June, reversing May's outflows as investors returned after profit booking. Experts say cooling gold prices and persistent global uncertainties revived demand for the safe-haven asset.
